findings.message: Deliverable acceptance package still scoped to '5 files' — CPI not included. Fixed in R3 revision.
Confidence section stale: '5 files' and '5–6 files' blast radius. Fixed in R3 revision.
Confidence-adjustments section contradicted headline values (88% vs 92%/90%). Fixed in R3 revision.
Route-verification risk stale — routes confirmed to exist. Fixed in R3 revision.
Planning constraint saying 'plan must verify routes' is stale. Fixed in R3 revision.

note: Round 3 is final per protocol. Score 4.0 = credible. All findings are internal consistency issues, now resolved.
